name: polars
description: Fast in-memory DataFrame library for datasets that fit in RAM. Use when pandas is too slow but data still fits in memory. Lazy evaluation, parallel execution, Apache Arrow backend.

interface.shortDescription: Fast in-memory DataFrame library for datasets that fit in RAM. Use when pandas is too slow but data still fits in memory
interface.longDescription: Fast in-memory DataFrame library for datasets that fit in RAM. Use when pandas is too slow but data still fits in memory. Lazy evaluation, parallel execution, Apache Arrow backend.
